prompt:
ND-filter long-exposure seascape photography (intended use).
Scene: a volcanic black-rock coastline at dawn, distant sea stacks fading into mist.
Subject: the jagged rocks and silk-smooth motion-blurred waves, with a single weathered cypress tree silhouetted on a cliff edge on the right.
Key details: photorealistic rendering, crashing turquoise waves frozen in silk-smooth long-exposure motion, soft pastel sunrise sky in pink-orange-violet gradient, hyper-real rock texture, fine water spray detail, professional landscape composition.
Constraints: no figures, no boats, no text, no watermark.
